name: vibe-contributer
description: Guides developer-adjacent contributors through the open-source contribution pipeline with non-slop process discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Find repos, fix issues, ship PRs — with non-slop process discipline.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Contributer encodes the 'AI as junior engineer you manage carefully' methodology into structured skills. It guides developer-adjacent contributors through finding actively maintained repos, identifying workable issues, planning solutions, building with embedded verification gates, critiquing through a multi-stage external-verification pipeline, and shipping PRs.
defaultPrompt: Find me a repo to contribute to
